text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The last morning of summer camp is here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the Umamusume are boarding the bus back to
Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There's no time left until the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! That's right! I'm the first-rate Umamusume,
King Halo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Who's the smartest of them all?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Wait a second! This is no time for a call and
response! Don't distract me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I swear, keep your jokes in moderation. We don't
have the time right now...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As soon as summer is over, we have the Kikuka
Sho—the last race of the Triple Crown tour!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's a 3,000-meter long-distance race on turf. It'll
be challenging, but I must prevail...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo stares out the window on the bus ride
back to the academy, lost in thought.
